title: Board setup for Home Developer
excerpt: Hi all! So I am trying to figure out best way to setup Monday for my home development company. I made a folder in Monday called “Single Family Developments” and right now i have a separate board for each address developm…

posts.author: dreborn (Jordan Friedman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all! So I am trying to figure out best way to setup Monday for my home development company. I made a folder in Monday called “Single Family Developments” and right now i have a separate board for each address development. But we are going to do hundreds a year! I don’t want to have that many separate boards to go through.

Each board is setup as a sort of checklist/chronology of what needs to get done at each property.

I was thinking a view would be great for each property but i can’t figure out how that would work. Anyone have any idea on how i should set it up?

Or do i just have to have a separate board for each property?

Thanks!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @dreborn, thanks for posting and explaining a bit about what you are looking to achieve with monday.com!

Will each checklist/chronology of what needs to get done at each property be the same? If so, I would recommend creating a template with this checklist, and then creating a board for each property.

I know that sounds like it might be a lot of boards—what would you think about archiving the properties that you are finished with? These boards will then live in your account forever in case you need to reference them but they won’t show up in your lefthand pane anymore.
